risk: medium: SPI infrared transmitter. The first hardware session must not issue write() or physical IR transmission.
rollback: Follow GUIA_TESTE_CONTROLADO_OUTRO_AMBIENTE.md: copy and hash stock module, unbind only after refcount is zero, restore stock module and bind spi15.0.
stop_conditions: any KASAN, KCSAN, CFI, BUG, Oops or panic
